name: Safaid Channe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onions and fry for 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and ginger and fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add all the spices plus the lemon juice. Mix well and fry for 2 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes and cook for another 5 minutes.
6. Add the stock, salt, and another 1/2 cup of water. Cover and simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
7. Add chick peas and cook, covered, for another 10 minutes.
8. Serve garnished with sliced onion and green chilies. Serve with any puffy bread.
